**Describe the issue with the current documentation**
Please point out where the documentation is missing, confusing, or outdated. Provide links to the specific Markdown file or section if possible.

**What part of the project does this affect?**
- [ ] Backend Installation
- [ ] Frontend setup
- [ ] AI Core / Python
- [ ] Community Guidelines (Code of Conduct, Readme, etc.)

**Proposed changes**
How would you fix it? Feel free to describe or provide the corrected text.

**Additional context**
Add any other context here.
